bandit_strategy_prompt.name: bandit_strategy_prompt
bandit_strategy_prompt.value:
For Bandit-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

Learned rules:
- For Bandit, explore every button once, track empirical reward, then exploit the best observed button.

frozenlake_strategy_prompt.value:
For FrozenLake-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

general_strategy_prompt.name: general_strategy_prompt
general_strategy_prompt.role_description: General TextArena action-format and safety strategy.
general_strategy_prompt.value: Play valid TextArena actions. Read the latest observation, choose legal moves, and avoid changing the environment rules.

guessthenumber_strategy_prompt.name: guessthenumber_strategy_prompt
guessthenumber_strategy_prompt.value:
For GuessTheNumber-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

Learned rules:
- For Guess The Number, maintain lower and upper bounds from higher/lower hints and guess the midpoint.

lightsout_strategy_prompt.name: lightsout_strategy_prompt
lightsout_strategy_prompt.value:
For LightsOut-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

Learned rules:
- For Lights Out, solve the binary toggle system and press cells from a valid solution.

mastermind_strategy_prompt.name: mastermind_strategy_prompt
mastermind_strategy_prompt.value:
For Mastermind-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

Learned rules:
- For Mastermind, maintain all candidate codes and eliminate candidates inconsistent with black/white feedback.

nim_strategy_prompt.name: nim_strategy_prompt
nim_strategy_prompt.value:
For Nim-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

Learned rules:
- For Nim, use the xor strategy: move to a zero nim-sum when possible.

towerofhanoi_strategy_prompt.value:
For TowerOfHanoi-v0, start with a simple legal action policy.

Learned rules:
- For Tower of Hanoi, follow the recursive optimal disk-moving plan from A to C.
